title: A Walk by the Beach
content: Emma and Daniel took off their shoes and walked along the beach as the waves gently reached the sand. They collected small seashells and laughed whenever the cold water touched their feet. The evening sky slowly turned orange as the sun began to set. Daniel picked up a beautiful shell and handed it to Emma. “Now you'll always remember today,” he said. Emma smiled because she knew she would remember the day even without the shell.
